{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Jai Ancestor’s Spear
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai Ancestor’s Spear]] has a technique that allows it to steal [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
